title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Ebooks in Nigeria Without PayPal — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a Nigerian ebook seller with no access to PayPal. You can't use Stripe due to your country's restrictions. Gumroad and Payhip also bar you from selling your digital products. What's left? You need alternatives for selling ebooks in Nigeria without PayPal, and NOWPayments might be your only hope. But how do you really compare NOWPayments to other options? You're about to find out.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip all have one thing in common: they exclude specific countries and impose strict KYC requirements. However, NOWPayments stands out as a PayPal alternative that accepts over 300 cryptocurrencies, allowing you to sell ebooks worldwide without worrying about blocked countries or excessive fees. Meanwhile, the Full Stack Bundle offers a comprehensive solution, including the Core Shop Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, to create a seamless selling experience for your digital products.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

If you're from Nigeria, your options are severely limited. PayPal and Stripe restrict Nigerian users due to regulatory issues, while Gumroad and Payhip have more stringent requirements that might not be feasible for you. NOWPayments, on the other hand, doesn't require users to create an account or provide identification, making it an attractive choice for creators in restricted countries. The Full Stack Bundle also offers a payment processor, NOWPayments, which allows global transactions and supports various cryptocurrencies.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, NOWPayments is unmatched, offering instant transactions that get your ebook sales paid out quickly. Moreover, NOWPayments charges a flat 0.5% fee, significantly lower than what PayPal and Stripe charge. However, the Full Stack Bundle offers a more comprehensive solution with its Core Shop Engine, which automates delivery and payment verification, eliminating the need for manual processing and additional fees.
NOWPayments offers instant transactions and charges lower fees than PayPal and Stripe.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

The Full Stack Bundle takes a comprehensive approach to automation and delivery. Its Core Shop Engine handles automated delivery, PDF receipts, and payment verification, eliminating the need for manual intervention. Additionally, the Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics and transaction logs, making it easier to manage your ebook sales. NOWPayments, on the other hand, relies on instant transactions, but it's still a more manual process compared to the Full Stack Bundle.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Considering your situation, if you need a comprehensive solution that offers automation, delivery capabilities, and integrates with NOWPayments, the Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) is your best bet. With one payment, you'll get the Core Engine, Wallet Connect, Admin Dashboard, priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide to help you set up your digital ebook store. Alternatively, NOWPayments can be a decent choice if you're looking for a simple, hassle-free payment solution.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
The Full Stack Bundle provides a comprehensive solution for automation, delivery, and integration with NOWPayments.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking to sell digital products in other restricted countries, you might also want to check out the Full Stack Bundle, which provides a comprehensive solution for global transactions and supports various cryptocurrencies. You can explore more about Unchained Commerce's solutions at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with selling ebooks in Nigeria without PayPal, follow these steps: (1) sign up for NOWPayments and get your account details; (2) integrate NOWPayments with your Full Stack Bundle; (3) set up your ebook store with the Core Shop Engine; (4) configure the Admin Dashboard for real-time analytics; and (5) start selling your ebooks and get paid instantly.
Selling ebooks in restricted countries like Nigeria requires a more flexible payment solution like NOWPayments.
Full Stack Bundle — $79.99. Everything — Core Engine, Wallet Connect, Dashboard — plus priority updates, Discord support, and deployment guide. Your complete store infrastructure, one payment.
